frase_original: You cannot stop loving your child because you know that he has committed a wrong action. But you certainly stop loving yourself for loving him. ~ Rudransh Kashyap

texto: Think or don't think, but don't think that you are thinking when you are postulating.
explicacao: Citação de Kirtida Gautam sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Think or don't think, but don't think that you are thinking when you are postulating.” articula reflexao, juvenile-delinquency, parenting-advice em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como parenting-advice e psychology.
